subcodes.first_line: O scion of the glorious martyr! Thy letter dated 27 Rabi'u'l-Avval 1338 was received [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل شهید جلیل نامه که بتاریخ ۲۷ ربیع الاول سنه ۳۳۸ مرقوم گردیده وصول یافت
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @education of children; moral education, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @growth of the Cause, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
